zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Blount Bland於1486年出生在英國武斯特斯爾索丁頓時，他的父親Peter Richard Blount27歲，母親Catherine Corbett48歲。他於1503年與Jocasa Joyce Shirley在英國武斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1564年12月20日在他的家鄉享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Blount Bland于1486年出生在英国武斯特斯爾索丁頓时，他的父亲Peter Richard Blount27岁，母亲Catherine Corbett48岁。他于1503年与Jocasa Joyce Shirley在英国武斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1564年12月20日在他的家乡享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place called Bland in Sedburgh, Yorkshire, the origin of which is uncertain. Possibly it is from Old English (ge)bland ‘storm, commotion’ (from blandan ‘to blend or mingle’), with reference to its exposed situation. The modern English adjective bland did not come into English (from Latin) until the 15th century, and is therefore unlikely to have given rise to surnames.
French: nickname from Old French blant ‘flattering’ (from Latin blandus).

variants.name: Blandin
meanings: Altered form of   Blanding  , a surname of English origin.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: Blount
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Blunt
meanings: English: nickname for someone with fair hair or a light complexion, from Old French blund, blond (from Latin blondus) ‘blond, fair, yellow-haired’, used also of complexion.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Blount Bland was born in 1486, in Sodington, Worcestershire, England, his father, Peter Richard Blount, was 27 and his mother, Catherine Corbett, was 48. He married Jocasa Joyce Shirley in 1503, in Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 20 December 1564, in his hometown, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Blount Bland est né en 1486, à Sodington, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Peter Richard Blount, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Catherine Corbett, avait 48 ans. Il a épousé Jocasa Joyce Shirley en 1503, à Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 20 décembre 1564, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Blount Bland 1486 in Sodington, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Peter Richard Blount 27 und seine Mutter Catherine Corbett 48. Er hat 1503 in Worcestershire, England Jocasa Joyce Shirley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 20. Dezember 1564 im Alter von 78 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Blount Bland è nato il nel 1486 nel Sodington, Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, Peter Richard Blount, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Corbett, aveva 48 anni. Lui sposato Jocasa Joyce Shirley nel 1503, nel Worcestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 20 dicembre 1564, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Blount Blandが1486年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアソディントンで生まれた時，父Peter Richard Blountは27歳，母Catherine Corbettは48歳であった。1503年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアでJocasa Joyce Shirleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1564年12月20日に故郷で78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Blount Bland(이)가 1486년 영국 워스스터실르 소딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Peter Richard Blount(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Corbett(은)는 48세였다. 그는 1503년 영국 워스스터실르에서 Jocasa Joyce Shirley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1564년 12월 20일 그의 고향에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Blount Bland nasceu em 1486, em Sodington, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Peter Richard Blount, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Corbett, tinha 48 anos. Ele casou-se com Jocasa Joyce Shirley em 1503, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de dezembro de 1564, em sua cidade natal, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Blount Bland родился в 1486 г. в местности содингтон, ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Peter Richard Blount было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Corbett, 48. Он женился на женщине по имени Jocasa Joyce Shirley в 1503 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 20 декабря 1564 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Blount Bland nació en 1486, en Sodington, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Peter Richard Blount, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Catherine Corbett, tenía 48 años. Se casó con Jocasa Joyce Shirley en 1503, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 20 de diciembre de 1564, en su pueblo, a la edad de 78 años.
